overview: Entono is a high fashion autumn wear brand based in Paris. The brand centers entirely on autumn as both a season and a color — exploring depth of hue, rhythm of form, and the emotional resonance of muted earth tones. The website serves as a digital lookbook and brand showcase, presenting editorial collections, a lookbook gallery, brand philosophy, and contact information. No e-commerce — pure brand experience.
goals: Establish Entono as a luxury autumn-only fashion brand with a distinct visual identity
Showcase collections (SS26, FW25, RES25) and editorial lookbook imagery
Communicate brand philosophy — autumn as color, emotion, and intention
Provide contact channel for press, wholesale, and general inquiries
Create an immersive, cinematic scroll experience befitting a high fashion brand
target_audience: Fashion-forward consumers, industry press, and wholesale buyers interested in luxury autumn wear. Audience appreciates minimalist design, editorial photography, and thoughtful brand storytelling. Demographics: ages 25-45, based primarily in Europe (Paris headquarters) with international fashion interest. Psychographics: values craftsmanship, seasonal intentionality, muted luxury over loud branding.
tone_style: Luxurious minimalism — warm earth tone palette (oat, charcoal, warm gray, umber, sienna), editorial typography (Playfair Display + Inter), generous whitespace, large display headings, cinematic scroll animations. Tone is poetic and restrained: 'The depth of hue. The rhythm of form.' Visual style draws from high fashion editorial — think Vogue Italia meets Jil Sander. No slang, no casual language. Everything feels intentional and curated.
scope_mvp: Hero section — full-viewport parallax image with brand name and tagline
Collections section — three collections displayed as editorial cards with hover interactions
Lookbook section — masonry image grid with lightbox viewer
About section — brand philosophy, atelier image, key stats (founded 2019, 12 collections, 1 season)
Contact section — contact form, email addresses, Paris atelier address
Fixed navigation — transparent-to-frosted-glass header with smooth scroll links
Mobile responsive — hamburger menu, stacked layouts, touch-friendly interactions
Scroll-triggered animations — sections fade up into view with staggered delays
constraints: Single-page static site — no backend, no database, no CMS
No e-commerce — no shopping cart, no product pages, no payment integration
All content statically embedded in React components — no dynamic content management
Image assets pre-loaded in /public/images/ — no CDN or dynamic image generation
Tech stack: Next.js 16, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4, Framer Motion
Brand identity already established — colors, fonts, and visual language defined in globals.css
Seven editorial images already generated and stored locally (~10MB total)

design_options: Warm earth tone palette — oat, charcoal, warm gray, umber, sienna
Playfair Display + Inter typography with custom tracking tokens
Cinematic parallax hero with scroll-driven fade-out
feature_requirements: Collection card hover interactions (lift, zoom, expand)
Contact form with animated submit feedback
Mobile hamburger menu with animated transitions
content_types: Collections — SS26, FW25, RES25 with titles, descriptions, images
Stats — founded year, collection count, season focus
Contact — email addresses, Paris address, contact form
constraints: No backend / no database / no CMS
No e-commerce / no checkout / no product pages
brand_guidelines: Brand name: ENTONO (all caps, ultra-tight tracking)
Tagline: 'The depth of hue. The rhythm of form.'
Founded: 2019, Paris (42 Rue du Faubourg Saint-Honoré)
Poetic, restrained tone — no slang or casual language
Autumn as color and emotion, not just a season
